title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Skill Brief: Instruction Router
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext instruction router increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
